title: Vacancy for Teacher at BITS Pilani

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at BITS Pilani
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!
